# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: WP User Authentication Plugin
Description: A simple user authentication plugin for WordPress.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

function register_user() {
    if (isset($_POST['username']) && isset($_POST['password'])) {
        $username = $_POST['username'];
        $password = $_POST['password'];

        if (!empty($username) && !empty($password)) {
            $new_user_id = wp_create_user($username, $password);
            if ($new_user_id) {
                wp_set_password($password, $new_user_id);
                echo "User registered successfully.";
            } else {
                echo "Error registering user.";
            }
        } else {
            echo "Username and password are required.";
        }
    } else {
        echo "Invalid request.";
    }
}

function login_user() {
    if (isset($_POST['username']) && isset($_POST['password'])) {
        $username = $_POST['username'];
        $password = $_POST['password'];

        if (!empty($username) && !empty($password)) {
            $user_id = get_user_by('login', $username);
            if ($user_id) {
                if (wp_check_password($password, $user_id->user_pass, $user_id->ID)) {
                    wp_set_auth_cookie($user_id->ID);
                    echo "User logged in successfully.";
                } else {
                    echo "Invalid password.";
                }
            } else {
                echo "Username not found.";
            }
        } else {
            echo "Username and password are required.";
        }
    } else {
        echo "Invalid request.";
    }
}

function admin_menu() {
    add_menu_page('User Authentication', 'User Authentication', 'manage_options', 'user-authentication', 'display_admin_page');
}

function display_admin_page() {
?>
    <div class="wrap">
        <h1>User Authentication</h1>
        <form method="post" action="<?php echo $_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']; ?>">
            <?php
                $username = (isset($_POST['username'])) ? $_POST['username'] : '';
                $password = (isset($_POST['password'])) ? $_POST['password'] : '';

                if (!empty($username) && !empty($password)) {
                    register_user();
                } elseif (!empty($_GET['action']) && $_GET['action'] == 'login') {
                    login_user();
                }
            ?>
            <table class="form-table">
                <tr>
                    <th><label for="username">Username:</label></th>
                    <td><input type="text" id="username" name="username" value="<?php echo $username; ?>"></td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <th><label for="password">Password:</label></th>
                    <td><input type="password" id="password" name="password"></td>
                </tr>
            </table>

            <?php
                if (!empty($_GET['action']) && $_GET['action'] == 'register') {
                    register_user();
                }
            ?>
        </form>

        <h2>Admin Login</h2>
        <form method="post" action="<?php echo $_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']; ?>">
            <?php
                $username = (isset($_POST['admin_username'])) ? $_POST['admin_username'] : '';
                $password = (isset($_POST['admin_password'])) ? $_POST['admin_password'] : '';

                if (!empty($username) && !empty($password)) {
                    login_user();
                }
            ?>
            <table class="form-table">
                <tr>
                    <th><label for="admin_username">Username:</label></th>
                    <td><input type="text" id="admin_username" name="admin_username"></td>
                </tr>
                <tr>
                    <th><label for="admin_password">Password:</label></th>
                    <td><input type="password" id="admin_password" name="admin_password"></td>
                </tr>
            </table>

            <?php
                if (!empty($_GET['action']) && $_GET['action'] == 'login') {
                    login_user();
                }
            ?>
        </form>
    </div>
<?php
}

function enqueue_scripts() {
    wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
    wp_enqueue_script('script', plugins_url('/js/script.js', __FILE__));
}

add_action('admin_menu', 'admin_menu');
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'enqueue_scripts');

?>
